summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LOGITAG Premium SaaS Layout (Phase 1). All requested features are working correctly: login flow, Premium sidebar with collapsible functionality, Dashboard with 4 KPI cards, detail view with 5-column card grid, Tableau/Cartes toggle, search functionality, detail modals for both tags and engins, sidebar navigation, and logout.

minor.impact: Real-time features affected but core functionality works

issues: Alerts feed and Activity timeline show static/mock data (as noted in requirements - planned for future phases)

passed_tests: Login flow with admin/user@1234 credentials - redirects to /tagdashboard/index
Premium Layout: data-testid='premium-layout' found
Premium Sidebar: data-testid='premium-sidebar' found with all nav items
Premium Main: data-testid='premium-main' found
Sidebar nav items: Dashboard, Carte, Assets, Zones, Activité, Alertes, Clients, Paramètres - all found with correct data-testid
Sidebar logout button: data-testid='sidebar-logout' found
Sidebar toggle button: data-testid='sidebar-toggle' found
Sidebar collapse: 260px → 72px (icon-only mode) - working correctly
Sidebar expand: 72px → 260px - working correctly
Dashboard title: 'Dashboard' displayed
KPI cards row: data-testid='kpi-cards-row' found
KPI card 0: 28/5937 - Engins non tagués
KPI card 1: 29/53 - Tague libre
KPI card 2: 1/5937 - Liste engin au dépôt
KPI card 3: 1/53 - Tague à maintenir
Mini map widget: data-testid='mini-map-widget' found
Alerts feed widget: data-testid='alerts-feed-widget' found
Activity timeline widget: data-testid='activity-timeline-widget' found
KPI card click opens detail view with title (e.g., 'Tague libre', 'Liste engin au dépôt')
Detail view: 5-column card grid with 24 tag cards or 4 engin cards
View toggle: data-testid='view-toggle' with Tableau/Cartes buttons
Toggle Tableau: Shows DataTable with columns (ID TAG, LABEL, FAMILLE, ADRESSE, STATUS, ACTIF)
Toggle Cartes: Shows 5-column card grid (default active)
Search input: data-testid='detail-search-input' - filters cards (24 → 20 when searching 'BLE')
Result count: data-testid='result-count' - updates dynamically
Tag card: REF header + 'Détails →' button, icon area, famille in colored text, chips (Disponible, Actif), footer with location
Tag modal: 'Détails du tag' title, STATUT pills (Actif/Inactif), form fields (ID TAG, LABEL, FAMILLE, STATUS, ADRESSE), Fermer button
Engin card: REF header + 'Détails →' button, photo, famille, chips (Réception/Sortie, battery %), footer with location

Engin modal: 'Détails de l'engin' title, photo, STATUT pills (Réception/Sortie/Non actif), form fields in 2 columns, IDENTIFICATION section, BATTERIE section, 'Voir sur la carte' button, Fermer button
Modal close with X button: data-testid='modal-close-x' - working
Modal close with Fermer button: data-testid='modal-close-btn' - working
Detail close button: data-testid='detail-close-btn' - returns to dashboard with widgets
Sidebar navigation: Carte → /tour/index, Dashboard → /tagdashboard/index - working
Sidebar active state: Dashboard nav item highlighted in blue when on dashboard
Logout: data-testid='sidebar-logout' - redirects to /auth
critical_code_review_comments: React warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in PrivateRoutes - minor issue, doesn't affect functionality
React warning: 'Received true for a non-boolean attribute full' in ButtonComponent - minor issue
seed_data_creation: None - using external API data via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: NEW Premium SaaS Layout (Phase 1) fully tested and working. All data-testid attributes are properly implemented. External API is slow (15-25 seconds for data load). Login credentials: admin/user@1234. Premium sidebar replaces old Metronic sidebar with collapsible functionality (260px → 72px). Dashboard has 4 KPI cards with real data. Clicking KPI opens detail view with 5-column card grid. Toggle between Tableau (table) and Cartes (cards) views. Search filters cards and updates count. Detail modals for tags and engins have STATUT pills, form fields, and action buttons. Alerts feed and Activity timeline show static/mock data (planned for future phases). Mini map is a placeholder.

detail_view.search: Filters cards and updates count (24 → 20 for 'BLE')
